assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
assertions.rationale: Uses context.Caller to check the caller
Uses string literal 'ClaimsProviderIdentityToken' instead of IdentityServerConstants.ProfileDataCallers.ClaimsProviderIdentityToken constant

assertions.assertion: Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: Only emits name for identity tokens

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: Uses IssuedClaims.AddRange for access tokens instead of AddRequestedClaims — no scope filtering
